Who I Am

About Me

I am a motivated BCA student with five semester exams completed and results awaited. Through my academic journey, I've gained foundational knowledge in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — the building blocks of modern web development.

I am passionate about creating web experiences and continuously growing my technical skill set. I enjoy turning ideas into reality through clean code and thoughtful design, and I look forward to contributing to real-world projects as I advance in my career.

My Work

Projects

Web Platform

Shree Jewellery

An online jewellery platform that allows customers to browse and explore premium ornaments from the comfort of their homes. Designed as the digital version of a physical jewellery showroom, it enables users to view elegant collections and check detailed specifications of gold, silver, and diamond jewellery. The platform offers a wide variety of traditional, modern, bridal, and customized designs — making it easy for customers to explore jewellery anytime, anywhere.
